mapper.select: select s.Schedule_Teacher_ID as teacherId, s.Schedule_Class_ID as classId, s.Schedule_Classroom_ID as classroomId, s.Schedule_Weekday as weekday, s.Schedule_Section as section, s.Schedule_Week as week, coalesce(c.Course_SingleHour, 1) as courseSingleHour from schedule s left join course c on s.Schedule_Course_ID = c.Course_ID
